notes: Confirmed: SKTouchEventArgs.WheelDelta and SKTouchAction.WheelChanged exist in the shared API surface, but only the Windows MAUI SKTouchHandler populates WheelDelta (via MouseWheelDelta, which natively provides ±120 per notch). All other platform handlers (Android, Apple/iOS, Tizen, Blazor, WPF, WinForms, GTK4) either hardcode WheelDelta=0 or have no wheel/scroll event handling at all. This gap persists across SkiaSharp 2.88.9, 3.119.0-stable.1, and the current main branch. The issue is a well-structured umbrella enhancement filed by the maintainer with sub-issues for each platform.

(None of these views have any input/touch/wheel event handling — they only render via PaintSurface)

(Main branch builds and runs — same investigation shows no wheel support added to any non-Windows handler)

versionResults.notes: WheelDelta API surface exists (added in Xamarin.Forms era). Only Windows/UWP handler populates it. All other platforms hardcode 0 or omit wheel handling.

Same gap: only Windows MAUI SKTouchHandler subscribes to PointerWheelChanged and passes MouseWheelDelta. Android hardcodes 0, Apple/Tizen use constructors without wheelDelta. Blazor/WPF/GTK4 have no input handling at all.
No wheel support added on main branch. Same code investigation shows 6 wheel-related lines in Windows handler, 0 in all others.

actionability.reason: This is a well-structured umbrella enhancement filed by the maintainer with 8 sub-issues for each platform. The actual implementation work happens in those sub-issues. This tracking issue should remain open as the specification and coordination point.

actions.description: Add area/SkiaSharp.Views label since the gap is in view-layer platform handlers, not core SkiaSharp

proposedResponse.body:
Thanks for the detailed specification! We investigated and can confirm that `SKTouchEventArgs.WheelDelta` standardization to the v120 convention is needed.

**Investigation findings:**

| Platform | Wheel Support | Details |
|----------|---------------|----------|
| Windows MAUI | ✅ Has support | Subscribes to `PointerWheelChanged`, passes `MouseWheelDelta` (±120/notch) |
| Android MAUI | ❌ Hardcodes 0 | Touch handler only handles Down/Move/Up/Cancel, no `GenericMotion`/`AXIS_VSCROLL` |
| Apple (iOS/macOS) | ❌ No support | Touch handler uses simple constructor without `wheelDelta` parameter |
| Tizen | ❌ No support | Touch handler uses simple constructor without `wheelDelta` parameter |
| Blazor WASM | ❌ No input handling | `SKCanvasView` only renders via `PaintSurface`, no touch/pointer/wheel events |
| WPF | ❌ No input handling | `SKElement` only renders, no `SKTouchHandler` equivalent |
| GTK4 | ❌ No input handling | `SKDrawingArea` only renders, no `EventControllerScroll` |

**Tested on:** SkiaSharp 2.88.9, 3.119.0-stable.1, and main branch — gap persists across all versions.

The API surface (`SKTouchAction.WheelChanged`, `SKTouchEventArgs.WheelDelta`) has existed since the Xamarin.Forms era but was only ever wired up for Windows/UWP. The sub-issues cover each platform's implementation.
